title: Reconcile stuck orders
description: Find orders wedged between paid and fulfilled and drive them to a consistent state.
body: Steps: 1. Query orders that have been paid but not fulfilled past a threshold. 2. For each, determine whether payment, reservation, and fulfilment agree. 3. Identify where a partial failure left the order between states. 4. Drive it forward (fulfil) or backward (refund and restock) per the state graph. 5. Make the recovery idempotent so re-running is safe. Rollback point: before any money-affecting recovery, gate on business.finance. Validation: no order remains between paid and fulfilled past the threshold and money matches stock.
